extensionDescription.message: Next-gen developer utilities for Salesforce (DevToolsNext): SOQL/Apex runner, record Inspector, data export, API URL builder, Login as User, Login History, User/License admin dashboard (7 cards), 21 design document generators (incl. org snapshot), Limits dashboard, PROD 2-layer defense across 6 paths, documented least-privilege security transparency (SECURITY.md), auto-update, settings export/import.
